title: Aurora World Pompom 6-inch Penguin - Multicolor, S
features: From Aurora's fabulous range of collectible Pom Pom Penguins
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Adorable Pom Pom Penguin soft toy in a two tone plush material with sparkly eyes
Children will love this cute and hugely collectible Penguin.
description: From the manufacturer Aurora World Pompom 6-inch Penguin This adorable little penguin is looking for a new home! She is soft and cuddly with bright sparkly eyes. She will make the perfect gift for anyone who loves penguins. This delightful soft toy is produced to the highest standard, using the finest plush materials. Approx. 6 inches. Brought to you by Aurora World`s expert team. About us Established in 1981, Aurora World offers an extensive range of branded products for children and adults. The company sells its product lines via a wide variety of retailers including major zoos, department stores, high-end toy stores and top gift chains, as well as hospital gift shops, fine florists, candy stores and gift/stationary stores worldwide. Aurora is known in the industry for its incredibly high quality products, range of diverse offerings.
